current_life_events: Parents have moved in, and adjusting to the new living situation is proving challenging; a recent pottery class triggered body image concerns when a fellow student made a comment about her weight; work has been overwhelming with a new caseload and limited resources.
mental_state: Feeling drained and uncertain about her ability to care for her parents while managing her own life and career.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The added stress of caring for her parents, combined with the pottery class incident and work pressures, has heightened her anxiety and self-doubt, making these issues feel urgent and interconnected.
